title: Montana Highway Patrol Pulled Over a Giant Banana Car
script: Montana pulled over a banana! On Interstate 90 near Billings, a car shaped exactly like a banana was stopped by the Montana Highway Patrol. License plate: SPLIT. Driver: Steve Braithwaite, who has been pulled over by cops hundreds of times while driving this exact vehicle across America. This stop? His cargo boxes were partly covering the plate. Montana Highway Patrol posted the photo on social media with the caption: 'While it may be apPEALing, traffic laws still apply to fruit.' He didn't get a ticket. Steve has been driving the Big Banana Car since 2013. Says he was probably the most pulled-over man in America for the first decade. He is not wrong. How many years do you have to drive a banana before the jokes finally get old?
